Petition For Interpretation Of Will And Entitlement To Real Property
Off Calendar Feb-08-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for petitioner Eileen Stevens

The Court raised a question regarding notice to Champion Mortgage as successor to bank of America as holder of the mortgage on the property. Mr. Der responded that Champion had made a payoff demand into the escrow for the sale of the property, and that the bulk of the loan had been paid off through the sales proceeds. He said that he has been in communication with Champion and that it was aware of the probate proceeding, and that he was unaware of any other obligation outstanding to them other than finalization of accrued interest. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung. (Not reported)

Petition For Interpretation Of Will And Entitlement To Real Property
Off Calendar Jan-23-2018 Continued To Feb-06-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (625 Divisadero Street, #25. San Francisco, Ca 94117)
Off Calendar Jan-19-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ernest Der for Eileen Stevens.
Theresia Sandhu specially appearing for Attorney Megan Lees on behalf of Bank of America.

Ms. Sandhu stated that she is here to make sure Mr. Cooper knows about the sale, that the Bank of America loan was transferred to Mr. Cooper and that she wants to confirm that the sale will pay off all of the lien holders. The Court stated that it does not know how much the sale will provide, that liens have priority and that there is a reverse mortgage on the property that will have to be satisfied. The sale was confirmed at $440,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Nov-20-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ernest Der for Eileen Stevens.

Mr. Der stated that they have no information at all to track down names of heirs or street addresses, that the birth certificate for Jordan only list the Mother's last name with no first name and that it is a common name. Mr. Der also stated that the only asset is a condominium with a reverse mortgage of $190,000.00 on it, that he hopes to get it on the market and sell it, that a notice of default was received two weeks ago, and that the 90-day period ends in January and then they would have a trustee sale. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-21-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Petition for Letters of Adminisrtation is off calendar.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
